query:
ALTER TABLE `products`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `tenantId` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 AFTER `id`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `specDetails` text NULL AFTER `specifications`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `shippingDetails` text NULL AFTER `specDetails`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `isHidden` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `isFeatured`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `exclusiveSlug` varchar(200) NULL AFTER `isHidden`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `exclusiveImageUrl` text NULL AFTER `exclusiveSlug`;

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `isHidden` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `isFeatured`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `exclusiveSlug` varchar(200) NULL AFTER `isHidden`,
